docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, NEVILLE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED) SERVED NOV-26-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, WENER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, NEVILLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, WENER $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,750.00, I FIND THE PARTIES 50% EACH AT FAULT BASED ON THE WITNESS STATEMENT THAT WRIGHT WAS PULLING OUT OF A PARKING SPOT AT THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT AND THAT GONZALEZ QUICKLY WENT AROUND HIM. I FURTHER RELY ON GONZALEZ'S ADMISSION THAT HE WAS AWARE HE HAD TO GO QUICKLY TO PASS WRIGHT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WRIGHT, NEVILLE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, WENER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT NEVILLE WRIGHT. DEFENDANT WENER GONZALEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. THE DEFENDANT IS ALSO ASSISTED WITH SPANISH INTERPRETATION, PRIOR TO COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER, BY NON CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER KARINA GONZALEZ. MS. KARINA GONZALEZ WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURT CLERK R.SAHAJIAN. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
